projects.name: mingzhi2004/mingzhi2004.github.io
projects.narrative: Personal academic website built from the Academic Pages/Jekyll template. The repository shows practical familiarity with static-site tooling and deployment workflows, but the visible evidence points more to template adoption/customization than to substantial original software engineering.
resumeBullets: Built and deployed a personal academic website using a Jekyll-based Academic Pages template with SCSS customization and local development via Bundler/Jekyll.
Set up reproducible local development workflows for a static site, including Ruby/Bundler dependencies and optional Docker/DevContainer support.
Maintained structured academic content using markdown-based publishing workflows, with support for notebook/Python-based generation of publication and presentation pages.

projects.name: mingzhi2004/VPR-Cloak
projects.narrative: Research-oriented PyTorch code release for an ICCV 2025 paper on privacy-preserving visual place recognition attacks/defenses. The repo shows solid applied ML engineering around dataset handling, inference, evaluation, and attack pipelines, but appears to be an early code release with limited visible polish or community adoption.
resumeBullets: Built a PyTorch implementation of VPR-Cloak for privacy-preserving perturbation attacks against black-box visual place recognition systems.
Implemented multiple attack modes, including weighted spatial perturbations and DCT-based frequency attacks, with dataset-agnostic CLI workflows.
Integrated retrieval evaluation using Recall@N and visual fidelity metrics to assess both attack effectiveness and imperceptibility.
Used Faiss-based nearest-neighbor retrieval and batched feature extraction for scalable evaluation across large VPR datasets.

transcript.question: 先做一个简短自我介绍吧：你叫什么或希望我怎么称呼你？来自哪所学校、什么专业、预计哪一年毕业？如果方便，也请提供你的 GitHub 账号或主页链接，我会用它来整理你的项目和能力证据。
transcript.answer: 我叫刘夕媛，是南方科技大学的大四学生，预计2026年毕业，github账号为mingzhi2004，想当agent scientist
transcript.storageReason: Contains stable identity/background and long-term career goal: Liu Xiyuan, senior at Southern University of Science and Technology, expected graduation in 2026, GitHub handle mingzhi2004, wants to become an agent scientist.

transcript.question: 你说想做 agent scientist，具体更想做哪一类：偏研究做新方法，还是偏工程把智能体系统做出来？你理想中的第一份工作或读研方向是什么？
transcript.answer:
以下是我的两个项目经历：
1. 在 GitHub 个人项目 agent-career-compass 的开发中，我主导设计并实现了一套基于 TypeScript 和 Python 的智能化职业决策系统，利用 LLM 与 RAG 技术构建了深度访谈模块与动态成长库，实现了对用户职业画像的精准捕捉与个性化路径推演，展现了极强的 Agent 系统架构能力与工程落地水准。

2. 与此同时，我通过维护 research-reading-notes 项目持续沉淀学术思考，利用 Jupyter Notebook 对前沿领域的科研论文进行复现与深度解析，不仅系统性地梳理了复杂的算法逻辑，更将技术敏感度与严谨的研究方法相结合，体现了在工程实践之外深厚的学术钻研能力与对行业趋势的敏锐洞察。
transcript.storageReason: Provides durable relationship/location constraint affecting major career decisions: does not want long-distance relationship; girlfriend plans to pursue a PhD in Hong Kong.

transcript.question: 你说想做 agent scientist，具体更想做哪一类：偏研究做新方法，还是偏工程把智能体系统做出来？你理想中的第一份工作或读研方向是什么？
transcript.answer: 我希望不要和女朋友异地，她准备去香港读博，现在我有三个offer，分别是CMU AI MS、UCLA CS PhD、HKUST AI PhD、NTU AI4S PhD，你能给我合适的建议和计划吗
transcript.storageReason: Provides durable relationship/location constraint affecting major career decisions: does not want long-distance relationship; girlfriend plans to pursue a PhD in Hong Kong.
